name: mission_objectives
description: Mission Objectives (Core Rules pp.89-91). Three separate D10 tables by mission type. Quest finale is always FIGHT_OFF with +1 enemy.

MOVE_THROUGH.name: Move Through
MOVE_THROUGH.description: Push through enemy territory. At least 3 crew members must exit from the opposite table edge.
MOVE_THROUGH.placement_rules: Deploy on one edge, must reach opposite edge.
MOVE_THROUGH.victory_condition: At least 3 crew members exit from the opposite table edge.

DELIVER.name: Deliver
DELIVER.description: Transport an item to a drop point on the opposite side.
DELIVER.placement_rules: Assign one crew the delivery item. Mark drop point on opposite edge center.
DELIVER.victory_condition: One crew member starts with the item. Must reach drop point and spend 1 action to deliver.

ACCESS.name: Access
ACCESS.description: Reach a computer console at the center of the battlefield and gain access.
ACCESS.placement_rules: Console placed at exact table center. Standard deployment.
ACCESS.victory_condition: Reach console, roll 1D6+Savvy scoring 6+. Costs a Combat Action per attempt. Up to 2 characters per round. Soulless within 6". Engineer/Bot add +1.

PATROL.name: Patrol
PATROL.description: Sweep the area and check all patrol markers.
PATROL.placement_rules: Place 4 markers in each table quarter. Standard deployment.
PATROL.victory_condition: Check all 4 patrol markers (move within 3", spend 1 action). Any crew member.

FIGHT_OFF.name: Fight Off
FIGHT_OFF.description: Standard engagement. Drive off or eliminate all enemies.
FIGHT_OFF.placement_rules: Standard deployment zones on opposite edges.
FIGHT_OFF.victory_condition: All enemies driven off or eliminated. Quest finale always uses this objective with +1 enemy.

SEARCH.name: Search
SEARCH.description: Find a specific item among several search markers.
SEARCH.placement_rules: Place 3 search markers in enemy half of table.
SEARCH.victory_condition: Check each marker (1 action within 1"). Roll D6: 1-2 nothing, 3-4 encounter, 5-6 item found. Find item and exit.

DEFEND.name: Defend
DEFEND.description: Hold your ground and protect a location.
DEFEND.placement_rules: Place objective 12" from your edge. Deploy within 6" of objective.
DEFEND.victory_condition: Survive 6 rounds with at least one crew within 6" of objective. Enemies must not hold it.

ACQUIRE.name: Acquire
ACQUIRE.description: Grab an item at the center and escape with it.
ACQUIRE.placement_rules: Place objective marker at table center. Standard deployment.
ACQUIRE.victory_condition: Crew member reaches item (center), picks it up (1 action), exits from your table edge.

ELIMINATE.name: Eliminate
ELIMINATE.description: Take out a specific target among the enemy forces.
ELIMINATE.placement_rules: Designate one enemy as the target. Standard deployment.
ELIMINATE.victory_condition: The designated target must be eliminated.

SECURE.name: Secure
SECURE.description: Clear and hold a strategic position.
SECURE.placement_rules: Mark the position at table center. Standard deployment.
SECURE.victory_condition: At least 2 crew within 3" of the position with no enemies within 6" at end of any round.

PROTECT.name: Protect
PROTECT.description: Keep a VIP alive during the battle.
PROTECT.placement_rules: VIP deploys with your crew. Has Toughness 3, no combat ability.
PROTECT.victory_condition: VIP must survive. Follows a random crew member. If killed, mission fails.

result.name: Fight Off
result.description: Drive off or eliminate all enemies.

result.name: Deliver
result.description: Transport an item to a drop point.

result.name: Access
result.description: Reach and hack a computer console at table center.

result.name: Patrol
result.description: Check all 4 patrol markers across the battlefield.

result.name: Defend
result.description: Hold your ground and protect a location for 6 rounds.

result.name: Search
result.description: Find a specific item among search markers.

result.name: Acquire
result.description: Grab an item at table center and escape.

default_result.name: Fight Off
default_result.description: Standard engagement. Drive off all enemies.
